data.title: Proficio Dominates 2026 Global InfoSec Awards with Five‑Category Sweep
data.description: In Irvine, California on April 8, 2026, Cyber Defense Magazine (CDM) recognized Proficio with five prestigious 2026 Global InfoSec Awards. Proficio, a noted electronic information security company, was honored at the RSA Conference on the opening day of the event.

QATAR'S DEFENSE MINISTRY REVEALED THAT IT WAS HIT BY SEVEN MISSILES AND DRONES FROM IRAN ON WEDNESDAY.

The Qatari Ministry of Defense announces that the State of Qatar was subjected to an attack involving (7) ballistic missiles and a number of drones from Iran today, Wednesday, and our Armed Forces, "by the grace of God," successfully intercepted all the ballistic missiles and drones.

data.title: Major airlines raise luggage fees and fuel surcharges due to rising fuel costs post Iran war, affecting American and Canadian flights.
data.description: Airlines in the United States and Canada are facing financial pressure due to increased fuel costs resulting from the conflict in Iran. As a response, these airlines are introducing additional fees and surcharges for baggage, alongside raising ticket prices.

data.title: Edge Delta Makes All Telemetry Pipelines Data Throughput Limitless and Free for All Customers
data.description: A recent strategic decision has been made to expedite the acceptance of AI Teammates and Agentic-First Observability in the market. The observability platform Edge Delta aims to revolutionize enterprise operations by utilizing AI Teammates that possess the capabilities to observe, analyze, and make decisions throughout the entirety of the data infrastructure. This move, effective as of April 8, 2026, sets a new pace for the adoption of advanced technologies in this field.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- NESTLÉ® TOLL HOUSE®/
data.description: NESTLÉ® TOLL HOUSE® has introduced new soccer-themed chocolate morsels and cookie dough on 08-Apr-2026. The company announced changes to the products, aimed at catering to sports enthusiasts. The revised release provides detailed information about the new offerings, emphasizing their appeal to fans of the sport. This initiative is part of the brand's ongoing efforts to expand its product line and reach a wider audience. The updated products are set to hit the shelves soon, showcasing NESTLÉ® TOLL HOUSE®'s commitment to innovation and meeting consumer demand. Fans can look forward to enjoying the new soccer-inspired treats, with precise launch dates and availability shared in the accompanying announcement. Stay tuned for more updates regarding these exciting additions to the NESTLÉ® TOLL HOUSE® product range.

data.title: Axxess Names Olli Health First Elite Network Partner, Expands Strategic Collaboration Around AGILE Conference
data.description: A significant collaboration has been established between Axxess and Olli Health, involving premium network designation, substantial AGILE sponsorship, and upcoming software integration. The announcement was made in Dallas on April 8, 2026. Axxess, a prominent global technology platform revolutionizing at-home care delivery, revealed that Olli Health will be a key partner in this enhanced venture.

data.title: C Spire Completes Mississippi Capital Projects Fund to Expand High-Speed, Broadband Infrastructure
data.description: C Spire, a technology provider based in Ridgeland, Mississippi, has successfully allocated funds from the Mississippi Capital Projects Fund. As part of this effort, the company has extended home fiber access to over 14,000 residences and 18,530 undeveloped lots across several counties including Amite, Lincoln, Lamar, Madison, Desoto, and Hinds. This initiative has significantly benefited numerous areas.

data.title: Michigan Startup Wins $1 Million Investment at Second Statewide PitchMI Competition
data.description: In Lansing, Michigan, Governor Gretchen Whitmer, along with the Michigan Economic Development Corporation (MEDC) and the Michigan State University (MSU) Research Foundation, revealed Adrenaline Interactive as the top victor of the 2026 PitchMI Championship. This announcement came after a competitive event reminiscent of "Shark Tank" at Grewal Hall in Lansing. Adrenaline Interactive secured a $1 million investment, elevating their total winnings from PitchMI to $1.375 million. The company expressed their disbelief at the win, stating that it felt surreal.
